channel.title: OST on Cheng Music
channel.description: Recent content in OST on Cheng Music

item.title: Faithful Journey
item.description: What are these for These tracks are for the OST Composing Jam #5. I’m asked to make a set of soundtracks for an imaginary game. To make it clear: It’s a Jam for composers to make game music. However, I’m just a composer, I can’t make a whole game all by myself. Okay, so, I could imagine a game, with several levels and others. Cool, now I can work on the music.
